happyThoughts.quote: Amazing customer service! So kind a thoughtful, really walked me through the process!

turns.text:
Hello,

My daughter, Hadley Nelson (H. Nelson), has a UTR account, and we recently noticed that there are several issues with her profile.

First, the name attached to her match history appears to have been changed [location] (H. Nelson) to Rachel Hughes (R. Hughes), which is my name. We need her account and match history to reflect her correct name, Hadley Nelson (H. Nelson).

Second, there are several match results on her account that do not belong to her. Specifically, the Harrogate matches [location]removed. Hadley did not participate in any of those matches.

Earlier this evening, my daughter submitted a support ticket through the chat bot. However, concerned she may not have provided all of the correct account information. In particular, the email address associated with Hadley’s UTR account is my email address:

[email]

I believe she may have provided her personal email address instead, which is not the email attached to the account.

To summarize, we are requesting the following:

• Change the player name back to Hadley Nelson (H. Nelson) and remove Rachel Hughes (R. Hughes) from the player profile.
• Remove the Harrogate matches [location]as Hadley did not participate in those matches.
• Ensure the account is associated with the email address [email].

Thank you for your help in resolving these issues. Please let me know if you need any additional information.

Sincerely,

Rachel Hughes (R. Hughes)

Thank you for the detailed explanation, Rachel. I can see there are multiple issues with Hadley's profile that need attention:

1. **Incorrect player name** — profile shows "Rachel Hughes" instead of "Hadley Nelson"
2. **Incorrect match results** — Harrogate matches [location]removed
3. **Email verification** — ensuring the account is linked to [email]

These are profile corrections and match removals that require our support team to investigate and make backend changes. going create a support ticket for you right now so we can get this sorted.
Now I'll escalate this to our team:

Perfect! Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is **#843808**. Good news - as a power subscriber, your question gets high priority and will be answered before free users. Thanks and talk soon!

Our team will investigate all three issues:
- Correcting Hadley's player name [location]to Hadley Nelson
- Removing the Harrogate matches [location]'t belong to her
- Verifying the account email is properly linked to [email]
- Checking for any duplicate ticket submitted by Hadley with an alternate email

They'll also consolidate any related tickets to ensure everything is handled together. You should expect a response shortly given the priority status.
Thank you
You're welcome! If you need anything else, here help. Have a great day! 😊

I can certainly help you with duplicate player profiles. To get started, could you let me know which of these best describes your situation?

- Reporting duplicates for your own profiles
- Reporting duplicate profiles for your kids
- Reporting duplicate profiles for other players
My own profiles

Got it. To help our team merge your profiles, I'll need a few details. 

Could you please provide your full name, your location, and the links (or Player IDs) for the duplicate profiles? If you don't have the links, the display names and locations on the profiles will work.
My full name is Logan Collura Repp 208 mewborn drive, player IDs 5317168,3813777 those are the players IDs

Thanks, Logan. I have your name, location, and the Player IDs (5317168 and 3813777). 

What is the best email address for our team to use when following up with you about this?
[email]

Thank you, Logan. 

Before we proceed, I want to let you know that duplicate profile reports are reviewed manually by our support team. This process may take a few business days depending on volume. They will notify you once the review is complete or if they need any additional information (such as photo identification). Please don't create any new accounts or make significant changes to your profiles while this request is under review.

Here is a summary of the details I have for your request:
- **Name:** Logan Collura Repp
- **Email:** [email]
- **Location:** 208 Mewborn Drive
- **Player IDs:** 5317168 and 3813777

Is there anything else you need help with today, or should I go ahead and submit this ticket for you?
No you can submit it

Your support ticket has been submitted successfully — your ticket number is #831265. 

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
I want to unsubscribe to all emails

To unsubscribe from all UTR Sports emails, simply scroll to the bottom of any email you've received from us and click the **Unsubscribe** link.

If you'd prefer more control rather than a full unsubscribe, you can click **Manage Preferences** (also at the bottom of any email) to choose which types of emails you receive:
- **Marketing** – New features, events, and promotions
- **Transactional** – Match updates, registration confirmations, account activity
- **Product Updates** – Platform improvements and changes

Is there anything else I can help you with?
there is no link

That's frustrating — let me help get this sorted. Could you describe what you're seeing at the bottom of the email? For example, is the footer missing entirely, or is there text but no clickable link?
There is no unsubscribe link
Got it. To get this resolved, I'll need a couple of details. What type of emails are you receiving that you'd like to stop (e.g., marketing, event notifications, match updates)?
Event notifications

Understood — you want to unsubscribe from event notification emails but there's no unsubscribe link visible. I can escalate this to our support team to have it looked into.

Could you share your full name and the email address associated with your UTR Sports account?
Chris Phelps [email]

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is #846441. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

Is there anything else I can help you with?
no
Understood — take care, Chris! Have a great day! 😊
